Secure Design:Mbsomnus brown U-shaped hair grips have smooth surfaces and are easy to insert. Portable Storage Case:Mbsomnus brown hair pins come with a clear storage case, strong and sturdy, and durable, U-shaped hair pins won't fall apart, are easy to find, also flexible, effortless to open and close, when there is an emergency you can open with a gentle snap, and very convenient.
